descriptions: Bandidos attacked Los Traviesos members.
edges.evidence_quote: Three members of the Bandidos' El Paso chapter – president Juan Martinez, secretary Thomas Decarlo and sergeant-at-arms James Heredia – were charged with engaging in organized criminal activity-aggravated robbery after being accused of attacking and attempting to steal the colors of members of Los Traviesos Motorcycle Club in East El Paso on August 3, 2016.

descriptions: Native Mob is allied with The Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: People Nation , Bloods , Almighty Vice Lord Nation , The Boyz

Native Mob.description: The Native Mob is a Native American street gang founded in the 1990s in Minneapolis, Minnesota. It is one of the largest and most violent Native American gangs in the U.S., active in Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado, and South Dakota. The gang engages in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, and murder, with an estimated 200 members as of 2021. Members have been placed on the FBI most wanted list in 2025.

Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima.description: Mexican criminal organization originating in Santa Rosa de Lima, Guanajuato, founded in 2014 by José Antonio Yépez Ortiz alias 'El Marro'. Known primarily for fuel theft (huachicoleo) and drug trafficking, it has been in violent conflict with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. Despite leadership arrests, the group remains active.

edges.target: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima as an enemy of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Grupo Flechas, Cártel del Noreste, Cártel de Guasave, Cártel Nueva Plaza, Guerreros Unidos, Artistas Asesinos, Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima, La Familia Michoacana, Los Caballeros Templarios, Los Talibanes, Unión Tepito, Cártel de los Soles, Los Choneros

edges.target: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
descriptions: CJNG is in direct confrontation with the Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel over fuel theft and distribution routes.
edges.evidence_quote: El CJNG mantiene una confrontación directa con el Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima, conflicto centrado en el control del robo de hidrocarburos y las rutas de distribución.

edges.target: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima

descriptions: Rizzuto family killed Ducarme Joseph of the 67s as retribution for Nick Rizzuto Jr.'s murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Sources claimed his murder was retribution for his involvement in the murder of Nick Rizzuto Jr. in December 2009

descriptions: The 67s are associated with the Crips gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The 67s gang formed in the Saint-Michel district of Montreal, Quebec, Canada in the late 1980s and are associated with the Crips gang.

descriptions: Taliban forms alliances with Group of 41.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban form alliances with gangs ( People's Liberation Army and the Group of 41 ) of the Kalenjin tribe

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to these successor gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9" All of these crews, excepting the "Be Like Boys" gang, are named after Detroit city streets or housing projects and some of these gangs still exist under new leadership.

Azuma-gumi.description: The Azuma-gumi is a yakuza organization based in Osaka, Japan. It was registered as a designated yakuza group under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law in August 1993. The group has an estimated 50 active members and maintains its headquarters in Nishinari, Osaka.

edges.target: Democratic Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: PKK came to agreements with DFLP to facilitate activities.
edges.evidence_quote: The PKK also managed to come to agreements with the Democratic Front for the Liberation of Palestine (DFLP), the Fatah of Yassir Arafat or the Palestinian Popular Struggle Front (PPSF) of Samir Ghawshah and also with Masoud Barzani's Kurdistan Democratic Party (KDP) in Iraqi Kurdistan which would facilitate their activities.

edges.target: Democratic Front for the Liberation of Palestine

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... DFLP

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
edges.target: Democratic Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: DFLP split from PFLP.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1969, the Democratic Front for the Liberation of Palestine (DFLP) formed as a separate, ostensibly Maoist, organization under Nayef Hawatmeh and Yasser Abd Rabbo, initially as the PDFLP.

descriptions: Red & White Crew is a support group formed by Hells Angels in Sweden.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels have also formed support groups, such as AK81 in Denmark and the Red & White Crew in Sweden

descriptions: X-Team and Red & White Crew fought a gang war in Næstved and later in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: A gang war involving the X-Team and the Red & White Crew – the Hells Angels' equivalent of the X-Team – in Næstved broke out on 6 January 2002

descriptions: Red & Gold is affiliated with Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Mário Machado, a member of the Bandidos-affiliated Red & Gold gang

edges.evidence_quote: Imperatrice is allegedly the regent of the Andolfi faction, particularly linked to the Cuccaros.

descriptions: The infobox lists FLNC as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

descriptions: Clan Giugliano was a rival in a feud with Clan Moccia in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: probabilmente da un gruppo di sicari al soldo dei rivali dei Moccia, ossia i clan Giugliano e Magliulo , all'epoca impegnati in una faida proprio con i Moccia

Massa Carcerária.description: Brazilian criminal faction originating from the state of Ceará, founded in 2021 by former members of Comando Vermelho dissatisfied with the group's leadership. It expanded with defectors from Guardiões do Estado (GDE) and became the largest faction in Caucaia by 2022. Engaged in violent conflicts with rival factions, including massacres and forced evictions. As of 2023, it maintains an alliance with Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Infobox lists Massa Carcerária as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Massa Carcerária [pt] ...

descriptions: Guardiões do Estado is a rival of Massa Carcerária.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho , Família do Norte , Massa Carcerária [ pt ]

descriptions: Massa Carcerária listed as rival of GDE in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , PCC , Massa Carcerária

descriptions: TDN is a dissident group from GDE.
edges.evidence_quote: a região é dominada quase completamente pelo grupo TDN ou MASSA, que é uma dissidência dos antigos membros da GDE

descriptions: Massa Carcerária and Comando Vermelho were formerly allies but are now in a violent conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A decisão provocou uma sangrenta guerra entre os antigos aliados, sobretudo, em regiões como a Grande Messejana e Caucaia.

descriptions: Members of Guardiões do Estado left their group and joined Massa Carcerária.
edges.evidence_quote: Após a debandada de criminosos do CV, também integrantes da facção Guardiões do Estado (GDE) decidiram deixar o grupo e passaram a se autodenominar Massa.

descriptions: Massa Carcerária formed an alliance with the Primeiro Comando da Capital.
edges.evidence_quote: Em meados de 2023, a Massa passou a manter uma aliança com o Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: PCC lists Massa Carcerária as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Latin America : TCP , GDE , BDM , EPP , FARC , Tren de Aragua , Jalisco Cartel , Massa Carcerária [ pt ] , Primer Cartel Uruguayo.

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Original Brooklyn Youths.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Original Brooklyn Youths (OBY) / Brooklyn Family Riders (BFR)

descriptions: The infobox lists the Sam Clay organization as a rival of the Metz Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Various organizations over, Sam Clay organization

descriptions: Latin Counts were in conflict with Satan Disciples in the 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1960s, the Counts came into conflict with other gangs in the Pilsen area such as the Latin Kings , the Satan Disciples and Ambrose.

descriptions: Satan Disciples are stated as main rivals of Taylor Street Jousters.
edges.evidence_quote: The main rivals of the Taylor Street Jousters were Satan Disciples and Harrison Gents.

descriptions: Jokers is a puppet club of Hells Angels in St-Jean.
edges.evidence_quote: Every Quebec region had its own puppet club: the Rockers Motor Club in Montreal, the Rowdy Ones in Sorel, the Evil Ones in Drummondville, the Satan's Guard in the Saguenay region, and the Jokers in St-Jean

descriptions: The Jokers are a puppet club controlled by the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Saint-Luc clubhouse of the Jokers, an Angels puppet club

descriptions: The Costa cartel allied with former police to strengthen Los Alcatraces.
edges.evidence_quote: Gamboa y su lugarteniente en el cartel Wildron Gabriel Daza Mejía, alias "Gabi Daza" (asesinado en 2011 ), realizaron alianza con expolicías para potenciar bandas criminales como "Los Alcatraces"

descriptions: Aryan Circle fought a war with White Knights in the mid-1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: in the mid-1990s it was caught up in a bloody war with another white supremacist prison gang called the White Knights that cost the life of one White Knights member.

descriptions: Aryan Circle fought a bloody war with White Knights in the mid-1990s, resulting in a death.
edges.evidence_quote: Aunque el Círculo Ario fue creado por supremacistas blancos, a mediados de los 90´s se vio envuelto en una guerra sangrienta con otra pandilla carcelaria de supremacistas blancos llamada White Knights que le costó la vida a un miembro de White Knights.

descriptions: Scimitars MC is a support club allied with Cossacks MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Scimitars MC (support club)

descriptions: Lobos allied with Satan's Choice and Chosen Few against Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1981, Satan's Choice made an alliance with the Lobos and the Chosen Few gangs against the Outlaws.

descriptions: The Sauriello-Scarpa clan declared itself in open contrast with the Gionta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: dichiarandosi in aperto contrasto con gli storici clan locali, compreso quello dei Gionta

descriptions: The Camorra gave stewardship of Castel Volturno to the Rapaces, a Nigerian criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: the first town in which the Camorra sanctioned stewardship by a foreign clan was Castel Volturno, which was given to the Rapaces

descriptions: Terra Lliure is listed as an ally of ETA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Batasuna , Herri Batasuna , FARC , FLB-ARB , Provisional IRA , Terra Lliure

descriptions: ETA cooperated with the Catalan nationalist movement, which included Terra Lliure.
edges.evidence_quote: ETA cooperated with the Catalan nationalist movement, which had its own far-left separatist organization that based itself off ETA – Terra Lliure

descriptions: Terra Lliure was an ally of ETA; they coordinated actions and supported each other.
edges.evidence_quote: A Catalan revolutionary organization that based itself off ETA, Terra Lliure, was an ally of ETA, and both organizations coordinated their actions and supported each other.

descriptions: Buccaneers Confraternity is listed as a rival of Black Axe in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Supreme Eiye Confraternity, De Norsemen Kclub of Nigeria, and Buccaneers Confraternity
